# Jira Task Template

Use this when work is managed through Jira and linked to Bitbucket.

## Summary

[Area] Produce [artifact] for [audience]

## Description

Goal:

Expected artifact:

Public source links:

Repository links:

Approval gate:

## Fields

- Component: Course / Research / Events / Partners / Community / Platform
- Priority: High / Medium / Low
- Status: Draft / Ready / In progress / Review / Done
- Labels: `abc4rd`, `draft-first`, `source-backed`

## Checklist

- [ ] Public source attached.
- [ ] No private contact data.
- [ ] No partnership claim.
- [ ] GitHub or GitLab public work item linked.
- [ ] Bitbucket commit or pull request linked if relevant.
